title: Optimized Block Textures
description:
Optimized block textures that reduce FPS drops and improve performance. 
Helpful for PvP thanks to better clarity. More optimized blocks will be added, 
along with updates and fixes for new  versions.
body:
Optimized Block Textures (Performance & PvP)
Boost your FPS and gain a competitive edge!

Following the standards of performance-driven projects like Sodium, extra sodium and more culling this resource pack is designed to provide the best possible frame rates without sacrificing the core Minecraft experience.

Why use Optimized Block Textures?
While mods like Sodium optimize the game's engine, this pack optimizes the visual assets, reducing the load on your GPU by simplifying block textures and removing unnecessary data.

Key Features:
Frame Rate Boost: Simplified block textures significantly reduce FPS drops, especially on low-end PCs.

PvP Advantage: Clean and clear textures help with better visibility during fast-paced combat.

Vanilla-Like Feel: Keeps the original look of Minecraft![Activation guide: moving the pack to the Selected column](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e1a9879900f57e42631dd323971e8e183ff6ef3.jpeg) so the game still feels familiar.

Regular Updates: More blocks will be optimized in future versions to ensure maximum performance across all game versions.

Technical Details:
Category: Optimization & Combat.

Goal: Maximum clarity and performance for competitive players.
